sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108519" key="u(pokataste/llw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποκατα-στέλλω</orth>, <sense id="n108519.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">moderate, mitigate,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0067.tlg001:99" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Agatharch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">99</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
